lines.speaker: minotaur
lines.text: It is here your journey ends, Theseus…

lines.speaker: theseus
lines.text: Wait… I swear I couldn't move…

lines.speaker: minotaur
lines.text: Well… um… how did you get in here, then? Wait— you're dead? How can you even talk?

lines.speaker: theseus
lines.text: Man… this difficulty is impossible… the devs have to patch-fix this…
